meaning: n.(=barbecue)烤肉野餐,烤肉架v.烤肉,用调料烤(肉)
examples: The barbeque was meant to shatter the world record for the globe's largest grill-off.
Barbeque grilles, tin foil covered umbrellas, frying pots and cooking pans - all can do for this.
Talking of whom, thanks Poults for inviting me to your new house for a great barbeque.
The choice could not be more appropriate, since Magnolia Brewery and Barbeque is the latest addition to Dogpatch.
